name: GMK CYL Selene
description: Special-effects doubleshot ABS Cherry-profile set designed by whysoda; the first GMK CYL set to use GMK's embedded glitter-reflect plastic as its primary palette story rather than an accent. Purple and teal iridescent shift over a silver-grey base. Includes base, ISO/modifier, novelties (moon-phase legends), and spacebar kits. KBDfans global, buy ran 2026-05-15 through 2026-06-19, Q1-Q2 2027 fulfillment via GMK Germany.
